_publications._publicationTitle: Three-Dimensional Spheroid Drug Sensitivity Screening for Neurofibromatosis Type 1-Associated High-Grade Glioma

_contextSnippet: Plate 2,000 cells/well in 96-well round-bottom ultra-low attachment plates; allow spheroid formation overnight; apply drug combinations the next day; image RFP fluorescence every 2 hours over 72h using Incucyte; calculate IC50 (50% reduced growth vs vehicle) and LD50 (50% fewer cells vs start) using GraphPad Prism 9
details: 2,000 NF1-associated glioma cells/well seeded in 96-well round-bottom ultra-low attachment plates; spheroids form overnight; drug combinations applied next day; total integrated RFP intensity tracked via Incucyte every 2h over 72h; IC50 defined as 50% reduced growth vs vehicle control; LD50 defined as 50% fewer cells vs start of treatment; analyzed with GraphPad Prism 9
